config.ae2lp.enableLayeredMultiPattern.t:
When enabled, layered GT recipes are encoded into N intermediate patterns + 1 assembly pattern.
When disabled, layered recipes use single combined pattern encoding.
Note: multi-pattern requires external cell un-packing mechanism to actually automate.
config.ae2lp.autoAddCircuit.tooltip:
When enabled, GT recipe NBT is parsed directly to retain programmed_circuit Configuration (0~32).
When disabled, EMI stacks are used (faster but loses circuit Configuration NBT).
config.ae2lp.expandCellInputs.tooltip:
When a recipe input is a filled storage cell, auto-generate an additional pattern
using the cell's actual contents as direct inputs (no cell needed).
Supports recipes with multiple cell inputs.
config.ae2lp.cellPriority.tooltip:
DEFAULT: prefer dual_storage_cell, fallback to vanilla
PREFER_VANILLA: always use vanilla AE2 cells
PREFER_DUAL: force dual_storage_cell
config.ae2lp.bulkExportMaxRecipes.toolti:
Maximum number of recipes allowed for bulk export (Ctrl + click + button).
If a category has more recipes than this limit, bulk export is disabled.
Set to a high value to effectively disable the limit.
config.ae2lp.sourceBlankPatterns.tooltip:
When bulk export runs out of blank patterns in the encoding terminal slot,
automatically pull more from player inventory and ME network.
Disable to only use what's in the encoding terminal slot.
config.ae2lp.delayPerOperation.tooltip: Delay per click operation in milliseconds.
config.ae2lp.delayAdditionalPerPattern.t: Additional delay after each pattern encoding in milliseconds.
